name: gaming_login_event
description: Gaming platform login event telemetry with device fingerprinting, GeoIP enrichment, and session correlation. Uses baseColumnType='hash' for deterministic ID generation (Tier 3 / notebook-only).
tier_note: Uses baseColumnType='hash' which requires notebook execution. Does NOT work over Databricks Connect.

columns.name: EVENT_TIMESTAMP
columns.description: Login event timestamp, random within configured date range

columns.name: internal_ACCOUNTID
columns.description: Internal account identifier used for deterministic hashing (omitted from output)

columns.name: ACCOUNTID
columns.description: Public account identifier as 32-character hex string

columns.name: internal_DEVICEID
columns.description: Internal device identifier derived from account (omitted from output)

columns.name: DEVICEID
columns.description: Public device identifier as 32-character hex string

columns.name: APP_VERSION
columns.description: Application version (static value)

columns.name: AUTHMETHOD
columns.description: Authentication method used for login

columns.name: CLIENTNAME
columns.description: Game client platform, deterministically assigned from DEVICEID hash

columns.name: CLIENTID
columns.description: Deterministic client identifier (SHA-256 of ACCOUNTID + CLIENTNAME)

columns.name: SESSION_ID
columns.description: Session correlation identifier (SHA-256 of ACCOUNTID + CLIENTID)

columns.name: country
columns.description: Player country with weighted distribution

columns.name: APPENV
columns.description: Application environment (static value)

columns.name: EVENT_TYPE
columns.description: Event classification (static value)

columns.name: CITY
columns.description: GeoIP city derived from country via CASE expression

generation.expr: CASE WHEN country = 'USA' THEN element_at(array('New York', 'San Francisco', 'Chicago'), pmod(abs(hash(ACCOUNTID)), 3) + 1) WHEN country = 'UK' THEN 'London' WHEN country = 'AUS' THEN 'Sydney' END

columns.name: COUNTRY_CODE2
columns.description: ISO 2-letter country code

generation.expr: CASE WHEN country = 'USA' THEN 'US' WHEN country = 'UK' THEN 'UK' WHEN country = 'AUS' THEN 'AU' END

columns.name: ISP
columns.description: Internet service provider, country-specific selection via hash bucket

generation.expr: CASE WHEN country = 'USA' THEN element_at(array('Comcast','AT&T','Verizon','Spectrum','Cox'), pmod(abs(hash(ACCOUNTID)),5)+1) WHEN country = 'UK' THEN element_at(array('BT','Sky','Virgin Media','TalkTalk','EE'), pmod(abs(hash(ACCOUNTID)),5)+1) WHEN country = 'AUS' THEN element_at(array('Telstra','Optus','TPG','Aussie Broadband','iiNet'), pmod(abs(hash(ACCOUNTID)),5)+1) ELSE 'Unknown ISP' END

columns.name: LATITUDE
columns.description: City-level latitude coordinate

generation.expr: CASE WHEN CITY = 'New York' THEN 40.7128 WHEN CITY = 'San Francisco' THEN 37.7749 WHEN CITY = 'Chicago' THEN 41.8781 WHEN CITY = 'London' THEN 51.5074 WHEN CITY = 'Sydney' THEN -33.8688 ELSE 0.0 END

columns.name: LONGITUDE
columns.description: City-level longitude coordinate

generation.expr: CASE WHEN CITY = 'New York' THEN -74.0060 WHEN CITY = 'San Francisco' THEN -122.4194 WHEN CITY = 'Chicago' THEN -87.6298 WHEN CITY = 'London' THEN -0.1278 WHEN CITY = 'Sydney' THEN 151.2093 ELSE 0.0 END

columns.name: REGION_NAME
columns.description: State/province/region name derived from country and city

generation.expr: CASE WHEN country = 'USA' THEN CASE WHEN CITY = 'New York' THEN 'New York' WHEN CITY = 'San Francisco' THEN 'California' WHEN CITY = 'Chicago' THEN 'Illinois' ELSE 'Unknown' END WHEN country = 'UK' THEN 'England' WHEN country = 'AUS' THEN 'New South Wales' ELSE 'Unknown' END

columns.name: internal_REQUESTIPADDRESS
columns.description: Internal IP address as integer, device-correlated (omitted from output)

columns.name: REQUESTIPADDRESS
columns.description: Dotted-quad IP address computed from internal integer via bit shifts

generation.expr: concat(cast((internal_REQUESTIPADDRESS >> 24) & 255 as string), '.', cast((internal_REQUESTIPADDRESS >> 16) & 255 as string), '.', cast((internal_REQUESTIPADDRESS >> 8) & 255 as string), '.', cast(internal_REQUESTIPADDRESS & 255 as string))

columns.name: USERAGENT
columns.description: Constructed user agent string from client name and session

columns.name: EVENT_HOUR
columns.description: Hour of the event (0-23), derived via post-processing

columns.name: EVENT_DATE
columns.description: Date of the event, derived via post-processing
